title: desmodium capitatum
intro: Desmodium capitatum, also known as showy tick clover, is a perennial flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Desmodium capitatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. Desmodium capitatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its wound-healing and anti-inflammatory properties.
